creator: ohartman@mail.zedat.fu-berlin.de
text:
On 09/06/10 14:09, Martin Matuska wrote:
> The default modules are compiled in the lighttpd binary (therefore not
> to be loaded).
>
> Any more problems with this?

Hello.

Well, I forgot whether I answered or not. So I will do this by this 
email. I guess you can close my PR. I found an error caused by myself in 
the config file. The 'error' wasn't so obvious to me, since I 
copied/adopted the template config for virtual hosts for a non-virtual 
host setup and with the first block of this file activated (it sounded 
reasonable to have it to me) the reported error was generated. The error 
in this context is weird, but I assume one need to understand a lot of 
the internal processes to understand what happened. or this is really a 
flaw in the way lighttpd handles misconfigurations.

Regards,
Oliver
